title: alectryon pubescens
intro: Alectryon pubescens, also known as the Renga Renga tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae, native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant is rich in flavonoids and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Alectryon pubescens can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a valuable resource for natural remedies.
